revision.content:
==Complete these steps prior to every public event, including public hours.==

Space Rangers are primarily responsible for completion of this Protocol and the [[Closing Protocol]].

===At Bloominglabs===
# Clean the bathroom. 
## Ensure the toilet works.
## Ensure toilet paper resupply is within arm's reach of the toilet.
## Check paper towel level and, if low, ensure refill roll is visible and nearby.
# Sweep the floor, especially along walkways.
# Empty trash cans if over half-full.
# Clean dishes in kitchen sink and store out of sight.
# Ensure at least 10 [[File:RELEASE_AND_WAIVER_OF_LIABILITY.pdf|waivers]] are on a clipboard with a working pen and sitting on a prominent table.
# If anything smells weird, set up floor fans to ventilate the room and open a window as well.

===Elsewhere===
# Note exits and bathroom locations. 
## Communicate these to all guests.
